entries.content: NexusMind is an AI model proxy service that provides access to multiple AI models through a unified API. It supports OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google API formats.
NexusMind uses GLM-5 as the underlying model and uses system prompts to impersonate various AI models like GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, and Gemini 3.1 Pro.
NexusMind supports token-based billing with different pricing for different models. Users can recharge their balance and track usage statistics.
